title: membership — notification classes + categories
description: 11 notification classes. All finance notifications are transactional_required by default — payment + dunning + cancellation are contract-critical, exempt from CAN-SPAM opt-out (Section 5(a)(5)(A) transactional exemption). Marketing win-back campaigns (30 days post-lapsed) route through growth::marketing with marketing consent tier — NOT owned here.

categories.display_name: Membership activated — welcome to the academy
categories.description: Fires on the first successful payment activating a membership. Celebratory + includes access details.
7 days before next_renewal_at. Reminds parent of upcoming charge; deep-links to payment method update if card is expiring.
Confirmation of successful renewal — includes receipt link + new period bounds.
Fires per failed attempt (24h / 72h / 7d dunning cadence). Deep-link to update payment method. Cannot-opt-out — critical for contract continuity.

categories.display_name: Membership lapsed — payment could not be recovered
categories.description: Terminal. After 3 failed renewal attempts. Includes reactivation deep-link (allows customer to update payment method + resume).
Confirms cancellation. For soft cancel: includes period-end date + reminder that passes remain valid through the period. For hard cancel: includes refund amount + timeline.
Fires from refund module downstream. Includes refund amount + expected timing to hit customer's bank.
Admin-only. Fires when chargeback module reports a dispute. Cannot-opt-out — regulatory-sensitive.

categories.display_name: Trial ending — first payment coming up
categories.description: 3 days before trial_days conclude. Includes plan price + first payment amount.
Admin-only. Fires when plan.current_active_members reaches plan.max_active_members. Informational — admin can raise cap or communicate a waitlist to prospective customers.
Fires 7 days before valid_until when the membership has unused passes. Encourages the customer to use their credits.
